channel.title: OpenAI on Xiao.chen
channel.description: Recent content in OpenAI on Xiao.chen

item.title: Getting started LLM for workshop
item.description: Knowledge Referred to as “prompts”. Designing a prompt is essentially how you “program” a large language model model Plugins can be “eyes and ears” for language models Using commands to instruct the model what you want to achieve, such as “Write”, “Classify”, “Summarize”, “Translate”, “Order” Prompt example Give a demonstrations 1 2Q: What is prompt engineering? 3A: It's a laugnauge for LLM to interactive 4 5This is awesome! // Positive 6This is bad!
